variants: Petros Menedekos is a member of the Keeprite Ice Sculptors, where he engages in his passion for creating intricate ice art. He specializes in organic chemistry, deriving knowledge and insight that he applies both in his scientific and artistic pursuits. Petros completed his doctoral studies under the mentorship of Amelia Thibault, who guided him through complex research processes. His work and studies have been supported by the Fleetwing Discovery Agency, providing him with crucial resources for his research endeavors. Additionally, he holds a Liminal Stonemason Permit, allowing him to explore both the realms of chemistry and stonework in his creations.
